payload.author: claude
payload.body: Delivered: trust fix --safety (.unwrap()/.expect() → ? in Result-returning fns), verified to compile+run on stock rustc. REMAINING DEPTH (follow-up, the other half of the reviewer's ask): extend the named-arg fix path with cross-module/workspace callee resolution (today it resolves in-crate fns + TRUST_SIGNATURE_PATH indices only) — overlaps RT-66/RT-105's dep-index auto-discovery. Also: --safety is single-file; a directory/--write-tree mode would pair with the RT-105 walk.
